principle.summary: Brand3 Scoring is the working product and user hook. Visual Signature is the long-term R&D layer for human-reviewed visual perception.

observed_current_state: The homepage already centers the scoring input form at /.
Recent analyses and observability links are available from the homepage.
The shared footer currently exposes Visual Signature alongside scoring links.
Visual Signature has multiple dedicated routes and should remain accessible.
ideal_homepage_hierarchy: Brand3 Scoring title and short value statement
prominent brand URL input and analyze button
short trust or constraints note if needed
secondary Visual Signature Lab entry point

homepage_direction: Use scoring-first language on the homepage.
Make the analyze action obvious and above the fold.
Treat lab features as secondary research tools.
visual_signature_direction: Use Lab, Research, Advanced, and Evidence-only phrasing.
Avoid presenting Visual Signature as a peer product in the hero.
Keep governance and calibration language out of the main scoring path.
suggested_phrases: Analyze a brand from its URL
See the latest scores and reports

what_to_hide_by_default: Visual Signature governance details on the homepage
calibration summary blocks on the homepage
corpus expansion diagnostics on the homepage
reviewer workflow pilot details on the homepage
advanced research metadata outside the lab
what_to_keep_visible: one-click access to Visual Signature Lab

details: Update labels and helper text to make scoring the primary hook.
Re-label Visual Signature as Lab / Research / Advanced.
Keep the input form above the fold.
Keep results and report access directly below it.
Push lab links below the main action path.
Add a clear primary nav for scoring workflows.
Move Visual Signature into a secondary or collapsed nav group.

staged_implementation_plan.step: Reduce lab prominence in shared chrome
details: Change footer and global link treatment so Visual Signature is accessible but not dominant.
Home -> analyze -> status -> report remains the main path.
Visual Signature remains one click away, but not foregrounded.
